opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: These welts appeared out of nowhere, and the itching is completely maddening.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A red, raised, intensely itchy rash blew up all over my body in just a couple of hours this evening and it keeps spreading. I took an antihistamine an hour ago and it hasn't touched it.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on suddenly about 3 hours ago, starting with intense itching on my tummy
symptom_narrative.character: raised red itchy welts; some of them have a paler patch in the middle. Individual spots seem to fade after a while but new ones keep popping up somewhere else.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the itch is unbearable — I can't stop scratching and it's really distressing
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: started on my abdomen, now across my chest, back and the tops of my arms and legs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant itch; the individual welts are migratory — they come up and settle in one area and appear in another
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far; the antihistamine I took hasn't helped
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: scratching, and it feels worse when I'm hot
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: just the itching and the welts — I feel otherwise okay in myself
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't settle or concentrate because of the itching

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: one 10 mg tablet taken about an hour ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: independent adult living alone; no one else at home tonight

objective_data_offered.value: widespread raised red welts over the trunk and the upper arms and thighs; several have a paler centre; skin looks blotchy and the patient is visibly scratching
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance described over video/self-report; not a clinician skin examination

objective_data_offered.value: no swelling of the lips or tongue that I can see or feel, and my voice sounds normal to me
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-assessment of airway/swelling, not a clinician examination
